{{CargoOrgan
|name=Unidentified Kidney
|type=Common
|rank=purple
|id=10833
|idx=38
|description=A special ingredient that can be made into a variety of dishes such as stir-fried kidney, Kung Pao kidney, kidney soup, etc...You have to clean it before you cook it!
|skill=
|hp=1706
|def=132
|atk=171
|rush=157
|gene1=CRIT +5%
|gene2=Crit DMG +5%
|gene3=CRIT +5%
|gene4=Crit DMG +5%
|gene7=Crit DMG +5% (Awakened)
|}}
